title: Automation Fail?
excerpt: I’ve created a new form for issue submission with automations to move entries to specific groups. Pretty simple, but still all new submissions get tossed into the top-most group on my board. The automations are all “ON”,…

posts.author: ErorrMsg (Lee Davila)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’ve created a new form for issue submission with automations to move entries to specific groups. Pretty simple, but still all new submissions get tossed into the top-most group on my board. The automations are all “ON”, any ideas for a noob?

TIA!
